summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Four hydrated PRs remain open, non-security, and independently useful or maintainer-reviewable. #82665 is routed to central security handling because deterministic validation identified it as security-sensitive. No close, merge, fix, or raise-PR action is safe or allowed from this job.

actions.reason: Open contributor PR with useful scoped code and passing proof should remain independently queued for maintainer review; no duplicate, superseded, low-signal, security, or close evidence is present.

Open first-time contributor PR addresses a distinct channel behavior and has implementation/tests. Failing checks require ordinary maintainer/author follow-up outside this close-only inventory plan; keep it independent rather than closing.
Open contributor PR has useful scoped implementation and is explicitly waiting on author. It is not a duplicate, superseded, low-signal, or security-sensitive item, so keep it independent.
Security-sensitive classification must be quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling for the exact PR ref. This is non-mutating and does not affect unrelated inventory items.
